title: Madonna's New Dance Album
summary: Madonna is making a new album called Confessions II, which is a follow-up to her 2005 album Confessions On A Dancefloor. She announced it on Instagram by changing her bio to lyrics from her song Hung Up. The album will come out on July 3, and she shared a short video for the first track, I Feel So Free. Madonna worked with producer Stuart Price again, just like she did for the first album and her recent tour. She says dance music is important because it lets people express themselves without words. Madonna is 67 years old and this will be her 15th album. Her kids helped her record some parts too.

keywords.explanation: a collection of songs by a singer or band
a follow-up or next part of something, like a book or movie
a person who helps make music by recording and mixing songs
a social media app where people share photos and videos

What does Madonna say dance music helps people do?

background_read: Madonna is a famous singer known for pop and dance music. She has been making music since the 1980s and has many hit songs. Albums are sets of songs that artists release for fans to listen to. Producers like Stuart Price help create the sound of the music. Social media like Instagram is used by stars to share news with fans.
Article_Structure: WHAT: She is releasing a new album called Confessions II, a sequel to her 2005 album
WHERE: She announced it on Instagram and worked with producer Stuart Price in London
WHY: To share new dance music that she says is important for expression and celebration

perspectives.description: She believes dance music is meaningful and helps people communicate through movement.
